text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Relying on her own strength,<n>Matikanefukukitaru
makes her mark<n>on the Kokura Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As promised, she takes me to<n>Fukuoka's other
"sacred"<n>spot—Hakata's street food district.
There, she reveals there's a certain<n>race she
hopes to run in.

Instead of letting her fortune slips do<n>the honors,
Matikanefukukitaru<n>chooses to aim for the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She stokes her passion, determined<n>to earn her
spot on her own merits,<n>unlike what happened
with the<n>Takarazuka Kinen.
